translation_zh: 春节晚会上，各族代表身着盛装在台上演唱舞蹈共庆佳节。

sentence: 取得好成绩也不能自满，要再接再厉，不断进取
translation_en: Good grades should not lead to complacency; one must strive harder and continuously advance.
translation_zh: 好成绩不应让人懈怠，而应更加努力，持续进步。

sentence: 曾经有位总长，听说，他的出来就职，是因为某公司要来立案，表决时可以多一个赞成者，所以再作冯妇的
translation_en: Once there was a minister who, reportedly, took up his post because a company planned to file a case, providing an extra vote in favor during the ballot. So he dusted off his old skills.
translation_zh: 据说曾有一名大臣因一家公司打算起诉而上任，从而在投票时多投了一票。于是他重拾旧技。

sentence: 只要你舍得这辆汽车，我就奉陪三百回合，直到大雨把汽车冲进大河，咱俩一同葬身鱼腹
translation_en: As long as you're willing to part with this car, I'll spar with you three hundred rounds until a heavy rain washes the car into a river, and we both end up as fish food.
translation_zh: 只要你愿意把这辆车给我，我就和你打三百个来回，直到大雨把车冲进河里，咱们俩都变成鱼粮。

sentence: 他按照早出晚归捕鱼撒网那股悠闲的心情撑着船，编算着使自己高兴也使别人高兴的事情
translation_en: He paddled the boat with the same leisurely mood as when he went out to fish early and came back late, weaving stories that pleased himself and others.
translation_zh: 他划船的节奏一如早出晚归捕鱼时那般悠闲，编织着自得其乐也愉悦他人的故事。

sentence: 这人品质恶劣，对别人惯会造谣中伤
translation_en: This person has bad character and is prone to spreading rumors about others.
translation_zh: 这个人品行不好，爱传播他人谣言。

sentence: 农民向国家交售征购粮是责无旁贷的任务
translation_en: Farmers' delivery of compulsory grain to the state is an inescapable duty
translation_zh: 农民向国家交售余粮是不可推卸的义务

sentence: 曾几何时，他自己去做了一个小小的官儿回来，而他又劝我去学法政了
translation_en: Once upon a time, he returned as a small official, and then he advised me to study law and politics.
translation_zh: 从前，他归来时是个小官，随后劝我学法律和政治。

sentence: 老兄是曾经沧海，车皮底下也呆过三天三夜，这一点挤，而且不过两个钟头，不算什么，算不了什么
translation_en: Brother, you've been through hardships, even spent three days and three nights under a train car, so this brief squeeze isn't much of an issue.
translation_zh: 兄弟，你可受苦了，都曾在火车底下趴了三昼夜，这短暂的挤一挤算不了什么。

sentence: 由于经营不善，这家公司现已陷入债台高筑的境地
translation_en: Due to poor management, the company is now deeply in debt.
translation_zh: 由于管理不善，公司现在深陷债务。

sentence: 我喜欢那种斩钉截铁的作风
translation_en: I like a firm and resolute style
translation_zh: 我喜欢坚定果决的风格

sentence: 我心里又想起母亲的劳苦，辗转反侧睡不着，很想起来陪陪母亲
translation_en: I thought of my mother's toil again, tossing and turning unable to sleep, desperately wanting to get up and accompany her.
translation_zh: 我又想起母亲辛劳的身影，翻来覆去睡不着，迫切地想要起身陪伴她。

sentence: 这种友谊来自战火纷飞的年代
translation_en: This friendship stems from the war-torn era
translation_zh: 这段友谊源于战乱时期

sentence: 灾区人民以战天斗地的英雄气概，克服洪水带来的困难，恢复生产，重建家园
translation_en: People in the disaster-stricken areas demonstrated heroic spirit to overcome the difficulties brought by the floods, restore production, and rebuild their homes.
translation_zh: 受灾地区的人们展现了英雄气概，克服洪水带来的困难，恢复生产，重建家园。

sentence: 那小孩战战兢兢地走着，唯恐摔倒
translation_en: The child walked cautiously, afraid of falling.
translation_zh: 孩子小心翼翼地走着，害怕摔倒。

sentence: 不管风浪多大，他也不会张皇失措的
translation_en: No matter how great the storm, he will never panic.
translation_zh: 无论多大的风暴，他都不会惊慌。

sentence: 他们开始时，暗地里偷窃，随后就彰明昭著地任意抢夺
translation_en: They started by stealthily stealing, and later on, they openly plundered at will.
translation_zh: 他们先是偷偷摸摸地偷窃，后来则肆无忌惮地抢掠。

sentence: 我们人手不足，需要招兵买马了
translation_en: We are short-staffed and need to hire more personnel.
translation_zh: 我们人手不足，需要招聘更多人员。

sentence: 他虽然没有什么出色的本领，有时还爱贪点小利，可是人顶和气，也不招是惹非
translation_en: He may not have any outstanding abilities and sometimes he likes to take small advantages, but he is very amiable and doesn't cause trouble for others.
translation_zh: 他可能没有什么突出的能力，有时喜欢占小便宜，但人很和气，不给他人添麻烦。

sentence: 洪水霎时遮天盖地而来，冲倒了树木和房屋
translation_en: Floodwaters surged overwhelming everything, toppling trees and homes.
translation_zh: 洪水汹涌，淹没了everything，连树和房子都被掀翻了。

sentence: 你家里有什么东西也得登记上，是个针头线脑也得算上
translation_en: Everything in your home must be registered, even a needle and thread.
translation_zh: 你的家中所有物品都必须登记，甚至针线也不例外。

sentence: 一百个说空话的人，不如一个有真才实学的实干家
translation_en: A hundred empty talkers are no match for one hardworking doer with genuine talent and knowledge.
translation_zh: 一百空谈者抵不过一个有真才实学的实干家。

sentence: 处理任何案件，都必须有真凭实据
translation_en: Handling any case requires solid evidence.
translation_zh: 处理任何案件都需要确凿的证据。

sentence: 经过公安干警一个多月的严密侦察，这桩案件终于真相大白
translation_en: After more than a month of intense investigation by the police, the truth of the case was finally revealed.
translation_zh: 经过警方一个多月的 intensive 调查，案件真相终于大白。

sentence: 我们在学习上要争分夺秒
translation_en: We must make every second count in our studies.
translation_zh: 我们必须让每一秒都在学习中发挥作用。

sentence: 正本清源的工作是艰巨复杂的，必须下大力气抓好
translation_en: The fundamental work to clarify origins is arduous and complex, requiring significant effort to implement well.
translation_zh: 厘清源头的基础工作艰巨而复杂，需要付出巨大努力才能做好。

sentence: 受了丈夫的权利当然正名定分，该是她的丈夫，否则她为什么肯尽这些义务呢
translation_en: Being entitled to her husband's rights naturally confirms he is indeed her husband; otherwise, why would she fulfill these obligations?
translation_zh: 享有她丈夫的权利自然证明他是她的丈夫；否则，她为何要履行这些义务？

sentence: 你现在能正正经经地当个新中国的人了，还不该高兴吗
translation_en: Now that you can behave properly as a person in the new China, shouldn't you be happy about it?
translation_zh: 你现在能在新中国的社会中举止得体，不应该为此感到高兴吗？

sentence: 我们不要把文章分析得支离破碎
translation_en: We should not analyze the article in too much detail.
translation_zh: 我们不需要对这篇文章做过于详细的分析。

sentence: 老师希望我们健康成长，要知书达礼，全面发展
translation_en: The teacher hopes we grow up healthy and strong, well-read and polite, developing comprehensively
translation_zh: 老师希望我们健康成长，聪明有礼，全面发展

sentence: 一个快乐主义者首先得有知足的修养，就是古训所谓‘知足常乐’
translation_en: A hedonist first needs to cultivate contentment, as the ancient saying goes, "Contentment brings perpetual joy."
translation_zh: 享乐主义者首先需要培养知足，正如古语所说：“知足常乐。”

sentence: 走错了路，就应赶紧回头，如果执迷不悟，那是非常危险的
translation_en: If you go down the wrong path, you should turn back promptly; if you persist without realizing your mistake, it can be very dangerous.
translation_zh: 如果你走错了路，应该及时回头；如果执迷不悟继续前行，后果可能很危险。

sentence: 这几条罪案，本社同人当然直认不讳
translation_en: These crimes, of course, we admit without reservation.
translation_zh: 这些罪行，当然，我们毫无保留地承认。

sentence: 这倒不必多心，我是个无党无派的人，才敢这样直言不讳
translation_en: This is unnecessary worry; I am an independent person, bold enough to speak my mind directly.
translation_zh: 这是多余的担忧；我是一个独立的人，敢于直接表达自己的想法。

sentence: 站在他们前头领导他们呢？还是站在他们后头指手画脚地批评他们呢
translation_en: Leading them from the front or standing behind them to criticize them?
translation_zh: 带领他们冲锋还是站在后面批评他们？

sentence: 对犯有错误的同学，我们应采取治病救人的态度，帮助他们进步
translation_en: For students who make mistakes, we should adopt an attitude of treating and saving people, helping them to progress.
translation_zh: 对于犯错的学生，我们应该采取治病救人的态度，帮助他们进步。

sentence: 万绿丛中的土屋，栉比鳞次的排列着
translation_en: Huts in a sea of green, neatly lined up
translation_zh: 绿海中的茅屋，整齐排列

sentence: 缅想当年景象那种踵趾相接的商旅队，商旅队中各种语言的交响
translation_en: Imagine the bustling caravan of traders with languages交织如织
translation_zh: 想象商队中语言交织如织

sentence: 大家众口同声地称赞她献身于教育事业的精神
translation_en: Everyone unanimously praises her dedication to the educational cause.
translation_zh: 她的教育事业奉献精神得到了大家的一致赞扬。

sentence: 要从失败中吸取教训，以免重蹈覆辙
translation_en: To learn from failures to avoid repeating them
translation_zh: 从失败中学习以避免重蹈覆辙

sentence: 一大批被禁锢的艺术品，现在得以重睹天日了
translation_en: A large number of long-suppressed artworks are now seeing the light of day again.
translation_zh: 大量长期被压抑的艺术作品终于重见天日。

sentence: 而镇压人民的反对，竟不惜采用最卑劣无耻的手段来诛锄异己
translation_en: And to suppress the people's opposition, they resorted to the most despicable means to eliminate dissenters.
translation_zh: 为了镇压人民的反对，他们不择手段地消除异见者。

sentence: 书法、绘画、吟诗，诸如此类，他无一不会
translation_en: He excels in calligraphy, painting, poetry recitation, and similar arts.
translation_zh: 他在书法、绘画、诗词朗诵及类似艺术方面极为出色。

sentence: 这是一个演说时代，所以‘诸色人等’都能演说
translation_en: This is an era of oratory, so all sorts of people can speak up
translation_zh: 这是一个演讲的时代，所以各种各样的人都能发言

sentence: 机敏的公安人员根据现场的蛛丝马迹，很快找到了作案人的线索
translation_en: Clever police officers quickly found clues to the perpetrator based on subtle evidence at the scene
translation_zh: 聪明的警察根据现场细微的线索迅速找到了罪犯的证据

sentence: 因为她驻颜有术，所以虽然年过四十，看上去仍犹如少女
translation_en: Because she has the art of staying young, she still appears like a teenager despite being over forty.
translation_zh: 因为她拥有保持年轻的魔力，即使超过四十岁，她仍然看起来像一个青少年。

sentence: 会上陈列了他多年来的全部著作，那时他已是著作等身了
translation_en: His entire body was filled with his writings from decades of work on display at the meeting.
translation_zh: 他的整个身体仿佛都是几十年工作成果的展示，满是文字。

sentence: 领导者专横跋扈，就得不到群众的信任和支持
translation_en: Leaders who are tyrannical will not earn the trust and support of the people.
translation_zh: 独裁的领导人不会赢得人民的信任和支持。

sentence: 不由我不专心致志搞这一套
translation_en: I cannot help but focus all my efforts on this
translation_zh: 我不得不将所有精力都集中在这件事上

sentence: 转瞬之间，从曲折的山路有一队奔跑的马蹄声迎面而来
translation_en: In an instant, a team of galloping hooves came rushing from the winding mountain path
translation_zh: 瞬息间，一条马队从蜿蜒山径奔袭而来

sentence: 经医务人员的全力抢救，这名危重病人已经转危为安
translation_en: After the medical staff's full efforts, the critically ill patient has stabilized.
translation_zh: 在医疗团队的全力救治下，重症患者病情已稳定。

sentence: 你欠了我的，你得还。我一直没说过，你不能再装聋卖傻
translation_en: You owe me, you have to pay up. I haven't said anything, but you can't pretend deaf and dumb anymore.
translation_zh: 你欠我的，得还了。我没说啥，可你也别装聋作哑了。

sentence: 这些感情炽烈的诗篇，抒发了作者壮志未酬的愤懑之情
translation_en: These passionate poems express the author's frustration of unfulfilled ambitions.
translation_zh: 这些充满激情的诗作表达了作者未实现抱负的挫败感。

sentence: 学习上追根究底的精神，是非常可贵的
translation_en: A spirit of thorough inquiry in study is very precious
translation_zh: 研究中彻底探究的精神非常珍贵

sentence: 父亲，您生前谆谆教导我们，不要那种脱离人民的虚无主义、个人主义
translation_en: Father, you taught us before your passing to avoid空谈的虚无主义和个人主义
translation_zh: 父亲，在您离世之前曾教导我们要避免空谈的虚无主义和个人主义

sentence: 我们要奋发地工作，卓有成效地完成上级交给我们的任务
translation_en: We should work diligently and accomplish the tasks assigned to us by our superiors efficiently.
translation_zh: 我们应该勤奋工作，高效完成上级分配的任务。

sentence: 看到下一代健康活泼地茁壮成长，为人父母者无不感到十分欣慰
translation_en: Seeing the next generation thrive and grow healthy and活力四溢, parents feel immensely gratified.
translation_zh: 看到下一代茁壮成长，充满生机与活力，父母们感到无比欣慰。

sentence: 吃饭一拿起饭碗，就龇牙裂嘴装鬼脸说怎么净吃小米，还不敌猪食。人家那边一天两顿面，我还嫌不合口味
translation_en: As soon as I pick up my bowl of rice, I grimace and make a ghost face, saying why we only eat millet, even less than pig food. They have two meals of noodles a day over there, but I still find it not to my taste.
translation_zh: 我一端起饭碗就挤眉弄眼做鬼脸，抱怨为什么只吃小米连猪食都不如。那边一天两顿面，但我还是觉得不合胃口。

sentence: 读书人悲观失望，自暴自弃；可是那些工人却多么坚强呵，多么勇敢呵
translation_en: Readers are pessimistic and discouraged; yet how strong the workers are, how brave they are
translation_zh: 读者悲观失望，而工人们却如此坚强，如此勇敢

sentence: 散居世界各国的华侨，虽然不少已入外国籍，但其对祖国的忠诚仍是自不待言的
translation_en: Dispersed across the world, overseas Chinese, although many have acquired foreign citizenship, remain undeniably loyal to their motherland.
translation_zh: 遍布世界各地的海外华人，尽管许多人获得了外国国籍，但依然不可否认地忠于自己的祖国。

sentence: 她自惭形秽般只呆在一个黑暗的角落里，不敢发一言
translation_en: She cowered in a dark corner, too ashamed to speak.
translation_zh: 她缩在暗角里，羞得说不出话。

sentence: 我们要自觉自愿地维护国家和民族的利益
translation_en: We should voluntarily and consciously safeguard the interests of the nation and ethnicity.
translation_zh: 我们应该自觉自愿地维护民族和国家的利益。

sentence: 后来的史官更是自郐以下了
translation_en: Later historians were even worse than those before them.
translation_zh: 后来的史家比之前的更差。

sentence: 有人说中国的实业就会借此促进，那是自欺欺人之谈
translation_en: That claim that China's real economy will benefit from this is wishful thinking
translation_zh: 这种认为中国实体经济会从中受益的说法是盲目乐观

sentence: 一个国家要想强盛，必须要有自强不息的精神
translation_en: A country must have an unyielding spirit to thrive.
translation_zh: 一个国家必须拥有不屈的精神才能繁荣。

sentence: 玩火者只会自食其果
translation_en: Play with fire and you will get burned
translation_zh: 玩火自焚

sentence: 我么？你问我么？我是自私自利的个人主义者
translation_en: What? Are you asking me? I am a selfish individualist.
translation_zh: 什么？你在问我吗？我就是个自私的个体主义者。

sentence: 他本身是报纸编辑，因此每作新诗词必在报纸上自我吹嘘，俨然以当代文豪自居
translation_en: He himself is a newspaper editor, so he invariably boasts about his new poems in the paper, styling himself as a contemporary literary giant.
translation_zh: 他本人就是一份报纸的编辑，所以总在报上吹嘘自己的新诗，自封为当代文学巨匠。

sentence: 这些理论自相矛盾
translation_en: These theories are self-contradictory
translation_zh: 这些理论自相矛盾

sentence: 做事不能自行其是，最好听听别人的意见
translation_en: Doing things your own way is not best; it's better to hear others' opinions.
translation_zh: 按照自己的方式做事并不好；听取别人的意见更好。

sentence: 一个严于解剖自己的人，往往是有自知之明的
translation_en: A person who is strict with self-examination is often self-aware.
translation_zh: 自我反省严格的人往往很有自知之明。

sentence: 察其原因，不外有少数顽固分子，不顾民族国家利益，恣意妄为
translation_en: The reason is that a few stubborn elements disregard the national interest and act recklessly.
translation_zh: 原因是少数顽固分子无视国家利益，行事鲁莽。

sentence: 我国是一个多山之国，山脉纵横交错
translation_en: Our country is mountainous, with mountains crisscrossing the landscape.
translation_zh: 我们的国家是山地，山脉纵横交错。

sentence: 你看他那种走马上任的神气，你就可以知道他是一位全然不懂教育的外行乃至老腐败
translation_en: From the way he takes office, you can tell he is a complete outsider and old corrupt official who knows nothing about education.
translation_zh: 从他上任的方式就能看出，这人是个完全的局外人和老腐败官员，对教育一窍不通。

sentence: 他感到，内心的一些想法摆到桌面上是站不住脚的，还是走为上策
translation_en: He felt it was best to stay silent about some thoughts that wouldn't hold up when laid out in the open.
translation_zh: 他认为有些想法不宜说出口，摆在台面上未必站得住脚。

sentence: 按照现在的用水量，我们的存水用到目的港是足足有余的
translation_en: With current water usage, our water supply will last well beyond the destination port.
translation_zh: 按照当前用水量，我们的水资源将在抵达目的地后很久还足够使用。

sentence: 这场空难事故的罪魁祸首竟然是一只在机场上空飞翔的鸽子
translation_en: The culprit of this air disaster turned out to be a pigeon flying above the airport.
translation_zh: 这次空难的罪魁祸首竟然是一只飞过机场上空的鸽子。

sentence: 请问您的尊姓大名
translation_en: May I know your name please?
translation_zh: 请问您的名字是什么？

sentence: 照顾‘左邻右舍’，不能搞先进迁就落后，不能搞平均主义
translation_en: Taking care of 'left neighbors and right neighbors,' cannot cater to the advanced while neglecting the backward, cannot practice egalitarianism.
translation_zh: 照顾左邻右舍，不能顾此失彼，也不能平均主义。

sentence: 这件事真叫他左右两难
translation_en: This really put him in a dilemma.
translation_zh: 这真把他难住了。

sentence: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不可过于繁琐，弄得作茧自缚，捆住自己的手脚
translation_en: We need to establish necessary rules and regulations but not make them overly cumbersome, binding our own hands and feet.
translation_zh: 我们需要制定必要的规章制度，但不要过于繁琐，束缚自己的手脚。

sentence: 有些人只会坐而论道，而不办实事
translation_en: Some people only talk about doing things without actually doing them.
translation_zh: 有些人只说不做。

sentence: 我看他们实在是坐失机宜，让敌人多准备了一天一夜
translation_en: I see they have missed a good opportunity, allowing the enemy to prepare for an extra day and night.
translation_zh: 我看出他们错失了良机，让敌人多准备了一天一夜。

sentence: 别人有困难时，我们要热心帮助，决不能坐视不救
translation_en: When others are in trouble, we should offer enthusiastic assistance and must not stand idly by without helping.
translation_zh: 他人有难时，我们应该热情相助，绝不能袖手旁观。

sentence: 从早到晚，长椅上都是坐无虚席
translation_en: The benches are always crowded from morning till night
translation_zh: 长椅从早到晚总是挤满了人

sentence: 哪里有压迫，哪里就有反抗。人民大众不会坐以待毙
translation_en: Where there is oppression, there is resistance. The masses will not sit idly by.
translation_zh: 压迫之下，必有反抗。民众不会坐以待毙。
